name: Llama 2
tagline: Open-weight dense text models at 7B, 13B and 70B, released with a license permitting commercial use.
metaDescription: Llama 2 (Meta), released 2023-07-18 — part of the Llama 2 line. Open-weight dense text models at 7B, 13B and 70B, released with a license permitting commercial…
overview: Llama 2 is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 2 line. Released 2023-07-18. Meta's second-generation open-weight dense LLM line, the first Llama released for broad commercial use.
What's notable in this version: Open-weight dense text models at 7B, 13B and 70B, released with a license permitting commercial use.
